name: @canopy/transports
description: Concrete network transports (NknTransport, MqttTransport, RelayTransport, RendezvousTransport) extracted out of @canopy/core. Each extends the core Transport base and lazy-imports its native lib (nkn-sdk / mqtt / ws / WebRTC), so the kernel stays free of concrete-adapter dependencies (de-fats packages/core; guarded by core/test/layering.enforcement.test.js).
